name: schema-registry-dag-dag-dependency-tracker
description: T192 DagDependencyTracker — DATA_PIPELINE archetype. Triggered by SchemaPublished event (async, time-decoupled). Rebuilds full DAG topology. Emits DagRebuildCompleted. NEVER called inline.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: async event-driven entry only, full DAG rebuild logic, DagRebuildCompleted emit, never inline invocation
Retrieve DATA_PIPELINE arch pattern + dag-rebuild-async + event-driven-pipeline + topology-rebuild patterns for T192
Break T192 into: consume SchemaPublished → load all schema adjacency records → rebuild DAG topology → store topology snapshot → emit DagRebuildCompleted

Generate dag-dependency-tracker.service.ts — @EventPattern('SchemaPublished') consumer, reads all schema dependency records from DATABASE, rebuilds adjacency map, stores topology document, DNA-8: storeDocument BEFORE emitting DagRebuildCompleted. NEVER called inline from T189 or any synchronous flow.
Named check validation: event_pattern_schema_published, full_dag_rebuilt, dag_rebuild_completed_emitted, store_before_emit, never_inline
Score generated code 0-100 against T192 iron rules: async event entry, full topology rebuild, DNA-8 order, DagRebuildCompleted emission
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=async-event-entry+full-rebuild+store-before-emit, rejected=inline-call-from-T189 OR partial-rebuild OR emit-before-store. curriculumTier=1.
